title: Request for Hire an expert
excerpt: we look for an expert from Israel, for integrating data from external source and build App.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Amit123,

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Amit123 ,

I am a certified monday professional having na experience on this for almost 3.5 years. I have also developed many custom integration to connnect an external app with monday.com.

Let me know if you’re interested. Feel free to reach out at aquibcs@outlook.com

posts.author: Amit123 (Amit)
posts.cookedHtml: Sorry, by regulation we must use a local integrator
